note: Accepted PRODUCTION (non-test/fixture) sharded≡exact RESOLVED-edge divergences on this repo (measured on the post-Prettier-baseline tree). functionsOnly{Exact,Sharded} MUST be 0 (hard failure). A run EXCEEDING this number fails graph-equivalence-check (a resolver regression); a decrease passes with a tighten hint (ratchet). CHARACTERIZATION (graph-resolution-correctness, after Phases 0-2): the 71 = ~34 'exact=[] sharded=[hash]' (sharded-only) + 25 'exact=[hash] sharded=[]' (exact-only) + 13 both-resolve-differently. Neither engine is the oracle. The sharded-only are a MIX of sharded-correct (exact wrongly DECLINES relative/intra-package dist-routed imports, e.g. logger.info -> core/lib/logger.ts) + a small residual of param-callback/test-file name-guesses (Phase 3 declines those). The 25 exact-only are NOT re-export-chain gaps (Phase 2 closed those) -- they are the BOUNDARY-EXTRACTOR NAME-COLLISION skip: extractBoundaryCalls skips an imported call when a same-NAME occurrence exists anywhere in the shard, even when it is a DIFFERENT local function (e.g. checks-universal has a local `isTestFile`, so the call to the IMPORTED `@opensip-tools/fitness` isTestFile is never emitted as a boundary call -> sharded declines). Phase 3 fixes that. The 13 both are cross-package same-name mis-narrowings (Phase 3). PROGRESS: Phase 0.1 removed 33 bare-name phantoms (204->171); Phase 1 removed the sharded JSX double-emissions (171->128); Phase 2 made buildExportIndex follow re-export chains, closing 56 real re-export edges in BOTH engines (128->72, exact-only 81->25) with zero regressions (sharded-only + both unchanged). SCC divergence 0 (was 3).
